title: Light Turkish Marzipan Stir-fry
description: A rich and dense dish featuring marzipan mixed with bhuna spices in a light sauce for a unique pescatarian-friendly treat.

ingredients.name: Bhuna Spices (Turkish Blend)
ingredients.notes: Can be adjusted for spice level.

ingredients.name: Heavy Cream or Coconut Milk
ingredients.notes: For a lighter texture, add a splash of water if needed.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped for adding to the sauce.

ingredients.name: Garlic Cloves
ingredients.notes: Finely minced or pressed, adds depth and flavor.

ingredients.name: Capsicum (Bell Pepper)
ingredients.notes: Chopped for color contrast and additional vitamins.

ingredients.name: Almonds, finely ground or chopped
ingredients.notes: To add crunch to the dish.

ingredients.name: Sugar
ingredients.notes: For sweetness; optional if using marzipan with natural sweetness.

ingredients.name: Turkish Delight (optional)
ingredients.notes: For a sweet and gel-like texture to complement the dish.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: To thin out the sauce if needed, keeps it light.

instructions: Melt the vegan or regular marzipan in a small saucepan with a bit of sugar and water.
Meanwhile, stir-fry onion, garlic, ginger, capsicum in oil over medium heat until translucent.
Add Bhuna spices to the stir-fried vegetables and cook for 1 minute. Stir in the melted marzipan mixture.
Simmer gently for about 5 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly.
Fold in finely chopped almonds, Turkish Delight if using, and garnish with a piece of fruit (optional).
Serve warm as a dessert or light snack.
